name: Waffle Weave Shower Curtain White - Room Essentials™
description: The Solid Shower Curtain from Room Essentials™  will fall gracefully around your bath or shower stall. Featuring dobby construction with a lovely waffle-weave pattern throughout for a touch of subtle texture, this decorative shower curtain is versatile enough to go with any decor style. The machine-washable shower curtain helps prevent water from spilling onto your floors while showering, and it's finished with a buttonhole top that allows for easy installation.
